name: B-Roll Drive Watcher v5 — Clean Import

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4', max_tokens: 8000, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}

additionalFields.content: =B-Roll auto-generated. Source: {{ $('Parse Scene JSON').first().json.sourceFileName }}. Type: {{ $('Parse Scene JSON').first().json.contentType }}. Duration: {{ $('Parse Scene JSON').first().json.totalSeconds }}s. Scenes: {{ $('Parse Scene JSON').first().json.sceneCount }}. Generated: {{ $('Parse Scene JSON').first().json.generatedAt }}
